author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas CORE is Now Supported in Multiple Languages!

We are excited to announce that the Star Atlas CORE graphic novel is now available in English, Portuguese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and Turkish!

This means that our community members who speak these languages can now enjoy the thrilling lore of Star Atlas in their native language. To access a translated version of the graphic novel, hit the filter button at the top right corner (image below). 

 Thank you for being a part of the Star Atlas community!  

 | https://play.staratlas.com/core-graphic-novel/
